title: llms.txt
description: Adds /llms.txt, /llms-full.txt, and per-post Markdown alternates so LLMs and AI agents can read your blog cleanly. Implements the llmstxt.org spec.

fields.label: Intro blockquote (Markdown, optional — defaults to site description)
Number of posts in 'Recent Posts' section of /llms.txt (default 20)
Number of posts to inline in /llms-full.txt (default 100, set 0 to disable)
Include full year-by-year archive in /llms.txt (turn off on very large blogs)
